title: gast.jar
description: adds a brand new miniboss called the "Gast" and a new weapon called the "sticc". joke mod lol
body:
# What is "Gast.jar"?

This mod is a f u n i mod that adds a mini boss called the "gast". It is like a ghast, but it sticks to the ground. It does 10 damage, and is immune to all damage but melee. 

## What does the gast drop?
The Gast drops a new item called "sticc" when defeated. This amazing weapon does 9.5 damage and attacks very quickly. You can even craft the sticc as shown in the gallery.

If you like silly joke mods or you want a challenge in the form of a brand-new miniboss, give this mod a try... >:)
